creator: ats@first.gmd.de
text:
A make checksum in ports/audio/mpg123.el gives after fetching the source 
from the mastersite a Checksum mismatch for mpg123.el. It looks like
the mastersite has a newer version now. Fetched mpg123.el from 6. August,
last change in the port from 21. Juli.

Fix: 

Maybe a make makesum is enough and a cvs from the md5 file, but i have
not checked the changes in mpg123.el :-).
How-To-Repeat: Do a make checksum without the file locally and let it fetch from the
mastersite.
